articles.title: AT $2.90/SHARE
articles.summary: Pacaso [4] has built a tech platform that simplifies co-ownership of vacation homes — a market worth $1.3 _trillion_.

articles.title: READY TO GET ON BOARD? Invest at $2.90/share
ETH/BTC RATIO HITS 2025 HIGH AS ETFS AND TREASURIES SOAK SUPPLY
articles.summary: Ethereum has increased 70% since June 1 versus bitcoin's 9%, lifting the ETH/BTC ratio above 0.037 to a new yearly high. The rally largely stems from ~$9.4B of U.S. spot ETH ETF inflows and digital asset treasuries now holding over 2% of ETH supply, up from 0.2% two months ago. Together, ETFs and treasuries have absorbed 3.7% of circulating ETH, while leveraged demand via VolatilityShares' 2x Ether ETF has added 456,000 ETH-equivalent exposure.

articles.title: BINANCE, COINBASE JOIN TRM LABS TO COMBAT CRYPTO CRIME
articles.summary: Binance, Coinbase, Kraken, PayPal, Ripple, and others are among the first to join TRM Labs' Beacon Network, a real-time intelligence system built with law enforcement to fight crypto crime. The network provides suspicious address flagging, real-time alerts, and rapid response tools to freeze illicit assets before cashouts, with participation free and opt-in for verified members. TRM Labs estimates at least $47B in crypto has been sent to fraud-linked addresses since 2023, with the Beacon initiative targeting threats from ransomware, North Korean hackers, and terrorist financiers.

articles.title: YE (KANYE WEST) RELEASES COIN
articles.summary: After months of speculation, Ye (formerly Kanye West) has released YZY coin on Solana. It is a “concept for a new financial system” that includes Ye Pay (crypto payments processor) and YZY Card (debit card for spending YZY). Ye Pay is already available on Ye's main website for use. The coin spiked to over $3 billion market cap shortly after launch before falling to $1.5 billion.

articles.title: INTRODUCING ZKC COIN FROM BOUNDLESS
articles.summary: Boundless's ZK Coin (ZKC) is the native token of its universal ZK proving protocol. It enables any blockchain to access zero-knowledge computation through independent prover nodes without requiring infrastructure changes. The ZK proving protocol introduces Proof of Verifiable Work (PoVW), a novel consensus mechanism where provers stake ZKC as collateral (typically 10x the request fee) and earn rewards by generating unique ZK proofs, with slashing penalties for failed deliveries. ZKC has an initial supply of 1 billion tokens with 7% inflation in Year 1, tapering to 3% by Year 8, and the effective circulating supply decreases as more proofs require collateral staking. The system creates a scaling loop where increased proof demand leads to more ZKC locked as collateral, positioning ZK Coin as the foundational economic layer for ZK proving across the entire blockchain ecosystem.

articles.title: COINBASE BETS ON AI PAYMENTS FUELED BY DIGITAL DOLLARS
articles.summary: Coinbase is positioning itself as infrastructure for the emerging AI economy with x402, an open-source payments protocol that enables apps, bots, and autonomous systems to charge and settle payments instantly using stablecoins. This strategic pivot represents a deliberate shift away from speculative trading toward building practical payment rails for AI agents that need to make micro-transactions for computing costs or services. Coinbase is betting that stablecoins will become the default payment method for AI commerce, offering advantages like instant settlement, programmability, and freedom from traditional banking restrictions.

articles.title: AN INTRO TO HYPERGAMBLIFIED MARKET DESIGN
articles.summary: Successful crypto gaming requires "hypergamblification" – integrating speculative mechanics directly into gameplay rather than treating games as labor-based extraction systems like Play-to-Earn models did. Play-to-Earn collapsed because it removed the fun and speculation that makes games sticky, turning players into extractors rather than participants in risk-based entertainment. Onchain infrastructure makes speculation-based gaming inevitable by providing instant liquidity, composable markets, transparent odds, and programmable settlement that can turn any game into a micro-market. Platforms like Multiplier are building this vision through gamified capital markets that route attention directly into market demand, representing a shift toward "an arcade wired into a financial system" where speculation and entertainment are inseparably fused.

articles.title: MOONWELL AND MAMO TACKLE BUGS WHILE PRESERVING USER FUNDS
articles.summary: Moonwell is making stkWELL users whole after a reward distribution bug, while Mamo redesigned its reward flow to avoid unnecessary token tax friction. Both fixes ensure users keep their expected yield, highlighting the team's commitment to security and efficiency.

articles.title: WILL THE FOUR-YEAR CRYPTO CYCLE HOLD OR BREAK IN 2026?
articles.summary: On one hand, BTC's historic four-year peaks could repeat as a self-fulfilling pattern reinforced by leverage and halving psychology. On the other, today's cycle is shaped by institutions, ETFs, stablecoin growth, and Fed dynamics, which may smooth volatility and extend the rally into 2026. Missing euphoric signals and ongoing DAT leverage risks leave the timing uncertain, but stablecoin supply growth remains the key indicator of whether this market still has fuel.

articles.title: DIGITAL ASSET TREASURIES FACE SHAKEOUT AHEAD
articles.summary: With multiple digital asset treasuries (DATs) now live, the market will favor the strongest managers as weaker firms risk trading below mNAV.

articles.title: $442M IN CRYPTO LIQUIDATIONS AS ETH, BTC LEAD LOSSES
articles.summary: ~$442M in leveraged positions were liquidated over the past 24 hours, with ETH ($189.2M) and BTC ($75.4M) seeing the largest wipeouts.

articles.title: TOKENIZED TREASURIES STILL SMALL DESPITE RAPID GROWTH
articles.summary: Tokenized U.S. Treasuries have doubled in six months to ~$7.5B but remain tiny compared to the $260B+ stablecoin market, where multiple individual stablecoins have passed the entire category.

articles.title: PREDICTION MARKET-ADJACENT PROJECTS WITH TOKENS
articles.summary: There are seven projects building or related to prediction markets with tokens, all of which are valued at below $20 million.
